functions.name: test_writer.make_buffer
documentation: Creates an IO object to be used for writing.

functions.name: test_writer.decode_buffer
documentation:
Extracts the text stored in the given bytes buffer and generates an
Unicode string.

functions.name: test_writer.test_write_string
documentation:
Checks that given an name and a value the `write_string` method
generates the expected XML text.

functions.name: test_writer.test_write_boolean_true
documentation:
Checks that given the value `True` the `write_boolean` method generates
the expected XML text.

functions.name: test_writer.test_write_boolean_false
documentation:
Checks that given the value `False` the `write_boolean` method generates
the expected XML text.

functions.name: test_writer.test_write_integer_0
documentation:
Checks that given the value `0` the `write_integer` method generates
the expected XML text.

functions.name: test_writer.test_write_integer_1
documentation:
Checks that given the value `0` the `write_integer` method generates
the expected XML text.

functions.name: test_writer.test_write_does_not_require_xml_writer
documentation:
Checks that the generic `write` method doesn't require an XML writer
paramater.

functions.name: test_writer.test_write_uses_alternative_root_tag
documentation:
Checks that the generic `write` method uses the alternative root tag
if provided.

functions.name: test_writer.test_write_accepts_xml_writer
documentation:
Checks that the generic `write` method accepts an XML writer as
parameter.

functions.name: test_writer.test_write_raises_exception_if_given_list_and_no_root
documentation:
Checks that the generic `write` method raises an exception if it is
given a list and no root tag.

functions.name: test_writer.test_write_accepts_empty_lists
documentation: Checks that the generic `write` method accepts empty lists.

functions.name: test_writer.test_write_accepts_list_with_one_element
documentation:
Checks that the generic `write` method accets lists with one
element.

functions.name: test_writer.test_write_accepts_list_with_two_elements
documentation:
Checks that the generic `write` method accets lists with two
elements.

functions.name: test_writer.test_write_accepts_elements_of_different_types
documentation:
Checks that the generic `write` method accets lists containing
elements of different types.

functions.name: test_xml_reader.make_reader
documentation: Creates an IO objec that reads from the given text.

functions.name: test_xml_reader.test_get_attribute_with_value
documentation:
Checks that given an attribute with a value the `get_attribute`
method returns the value.

functions.name: test_xml_reader.test_get_empty_attribute
documentation:
Checks that given an empty attribute the `get_attribute` method
returns an empty string.

functions.name: test_xml_reader.test_get_non_existent_attribute
documentation:
Checks that given a non existing attribute the `get_attribute`
method returns `None`.

functions.name: test_xml_reader.test_read_empty_element
documentation:
Checks that given an empty element the `read_element` method
returns `None`.

functions.name: test_xml_reader.test_read_blank_element
documentation:
Checks that given an blank element the `read_element` method
returns an empty string.

functions.name: test_xml_reader.test_read_empty_list
documentation:
Checks that given an empty element the `read_elements` method
returns an empty list.

functions.name: test_xml_reader.test_read_list_with_empty_element
documentation:
Checks that given a list with an empty element the `read_elements` method
returns a list containing `None`.

functions.name: test_xml_reader.test_read_list_with_blank_element
documentation:
Checks that given a list with an blank element the `read_elements` method
returns a list containing an empty string.

functions.name: test_xml_reader.test_read_list_one_element
documentation:
Checks that given a list with an one element the `read_elements` method
returns a list containing it.

functions.name: test_xml_reader.test_read_list_two_element
documentation:
Checks that given a list with an two elements the `read_elements` method
returns a list containing them.

functions.name: test_xml_reader.test_forward_with_preceding_test
documentation:
Checks that given some text before an element, the `forward` method
skips the text and returns `True`.

functions.name: test_xml_reader.test_forward_end_of_document
documentation:
Checks that when positioned at the end of the document the `forward`
method returns `False`.

functions.name: test_xml_reader.test_forward_with_empty_element
documentation:
Checks that when positioned at an empty element the `forward` method
returns `True` and stays at the empty element.

functions.name: test_xml_reader.test_read_element_after_empty_list
documentation:
Checks that given an empty list without a close element the
`read_elements` method returns an empty list and the next element
can be read with the `read_element` method.

functions.name: test_xml_reader.test_read_accents
documentation:
Checks that reading text that is already encoded using UTF-8
works correctly.

functions.name: test_affinity_group_reader.test_affinity_group_reader_with_assigned_vms

Test that reading of `vms` attribute of affinity group reads the `href`
of the link as well as content of the `vms` element.

documentation:
Test that reading of `vms` attribute of affinity group reads the `href`
of the link as well as content of the `vms` element. Test it's
correctly processed when link is provided after 'vms' element.
